# stackit_alb_waf (Data Source)

albwaf resource schema.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "stackit_alb_waf" "waf" {
  project_id = "xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx"
  name       = "example"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the WAF.
- `project_id` (String) STACKIT project ID to which the WAF is associated.

### Optional

- `custom_rule_group_name` (String) Name of the custom rule group for this WAF.
- `labels` (Map of String) User-defined metadata as key-value pairs. Should not exceed 64 entries.
- `managed_rule_set_name` (String) Name of the managed rule set configuration for this WAF.
- `region` (String) The resource region (e.g. eu01). If not defined, the provider region is used.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Terraform's internal resource ID. It is structured as "`project_id`,`region`".
- `usage` (Attributes) Object containing usage-information for this WAF. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--usage))

<a id="nestedatt--usage"></a>
### Nested Schema for `usage`

Read-Only:

- `count` (Number) Number of listeners using this WAF.
- `items` (Attributes List) List of Application Load Balancers with their associated listeners that use this WAF. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--usage--items))

<a id="nestedatt--usage--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `usage.items`

Read-Only:

- `listener_names` (List of String) List of listener names in this Application Load Balancer using this WAF.
- `load_balancer_name` (String) The display name of the Application Load Balancer.
